name: com.slack/slack-mcp
title: Slack
description: Search messages and threads, post replies, manage canvases, look up users - Slack's official MCP.

byoClient.guide:
Slack does not allow automatic OAuth app registration, so you create your own app once and Wayland reuses it.

**1.** Open **api.slack.com/apps** and click **Create New App → From scratch**. Name it (e.g. *Wayland MCP*) and pick a workspace.

**2.** In the app's left sidebar choose **OAuth & Permissions**.
  - Under **Redirect URLs**, click **Add New Redirect URL** and paste the URL Wayland shows below. **Save URLs**.
  - Under **User Token Scopes** add: `search:read`, `chat:write`, `users:read`, `channels:history`.

**3.** Scroll up to **Basic Information**. Copy the **Client ID** and **Client Secret** and paste them below.

**4.** Install the app to your workspace from **OAuth & Permissions → Install to Workspace** (only needed once per workspace).
